goal: Packaging-machine operator persona: Franka picks a bottle cap from a feeder, aligns it over a fixed bottle neck, presses down with an impedance-controlled Z-force ≤ 20 N, then applies a torque-limited ≥ 90° twist (peak torque ≤ 2 N·m) to seat the threads. Realizes ONET SOC 51-9111 yrkesroll-packaging-bottle-cap-001.
thoughts: Distinction from CP-NEW-peg-bushing-impedance: cap-tighten adds a TORQUE-limited rotational gesture after the linear insertion; peg-bushing terminates at force-cap.
Distinction from CP-NEW-assembly-constraint-verify: this canonical exercises live impedance + torque feedback, not pre-flight constraint validation only.
Workpiece topology: bottle neck = fixed slim Cylinder (radius 0.012 m); cap = wider Cylinder (radius 0.018 m, height 0.020 m) starting at the feeder.
Pick-place transit via cuRobo gets cap above bottle neck with ~5 mm air-gap; impedance + compliance takes over for descent and twist.
Z-force cap 20 N via add_force_torque_sensor threshold; ONET packaging-line spec calls for 'finger-tight' which we approximate at 2 N·m peak torque on the wrist joint.
follow_trajectory_with_compliance executes the rotational seat: 90°+ twist around the cap Z-axis with cartesian_impedance compliance enabled on the suffix waypoints.
Success criteria: cap world-Z within 5 mm of bottle_neck_top_z AND get_joint_torques wrist7 sample > torque_threshold AND get_contact_report shows cap-on-neck contact.
Compliance phase uses set_compliance_params (NOT just setup_impedance_controller) so the torque cap can be retuned per cap material; rubber cap → softer Z stiffness.
motion_controllers: curobo (transit, untested) + impedance (descent, untested) + cartesian_impedance via follow_trajectory_with_compliance (twist, untested).
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Worktable (cap feeder sits on top, bottle is anchored to right side)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Robot ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Bottle body (static — large cylinder) + Bottle neck (fixed thinner cylinder on top) ──
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Bottle",
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position=[0, -0.25, 0.84],
    radius=0.035,
    height=0.12,
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Bottle", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Bottle", attr_name="physics:approximation", value="convexHull")

create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/BottleNeck",
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position=[0, -0.25, 0.92],
    radius=0.012,
    height=0.04,
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/BottleNeck", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/BottleNeck", attr_name="physics:approximation", value="convexHull")

# ── Cap (dynamic — wider cylinder, picked from feeder) ──────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Cap",
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position=[0.3, 0.1, 0.835],
    radius=0.018,
    height=0.02,
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cap", schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Cap", attr_name="physics:mass", value=0.05)

apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cap", material_name="rubber")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Cap"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Cap", "/World/BottleNeck"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

# ── Force / torque sensor — 20 N Z-force cap on the wrist ────────────────────
add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/Franka/FtSensor",
    parent_path="/World/Franka/panda_hand",
    threshold=20.0,
    noise_std=0.05,
)

# ── Impedance controller — softened Z for compliant descent over cap ─────────
setup_impedance_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_frame="panda_hand",
    Kx=[300.0, 300.0, 80.0],
    Kr=[30.0, 30.0, 15.0],
    Dx=[30.0, 30.0, 10.0],
    Dr=[3.0, 3.0, 2.0],
    null_space_stiffness=0.5,
    null_space_damping=0.5,
    torque_mode=True,
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Compliance params — explicit Cartesian stiffness/damping for the seat gesture ──
set_compliance_params(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    stiffness_xyz=[300.0, 300.0, 80.0],
    damping_xyz=[30.0, 30.0, 10.0],
    stiffness_rot=[30.0, 30.0, 8.0],
    damping_rot=[3.0, 3.0, 1.5],
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Proximity sensor at the cap feeder ───────────────────────────────────────
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    position=[0.3, 0.1, 0.835],
    size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06],
)

# ── Pick-place: cuRobo transits cap from feeder to ~5 mm above bottle neck ────
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path=None,
    source_paths=["/World/Cap"],
    destination_path="/World/BottleNeck",
    drop_target=[0, -0.25, 0.945],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/Bottle", "/World/BottleNeck"],
    approach_height=0.15,
    lift_height=0.15,
)

# ── Torque-limited twist: ≥ 90° rotation about cap Z-axis under cartesian_impedance ──
# Trajectory dicts hold the rotational waypoints; rigid prefix handles descent,
# compliant suffix applies the seat-twist with peak torque budget 2 N·m.
follow_trajectory_with_compliance(
    trajectory=[
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.945], "orientation": [1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.940], "orientation": [0.9239, 0.0, 0.0, 0.3827]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0, -0.25, 0.938], "orientation": [0.7071, 0.0, 0.0, 0.7071]}}
    ],
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    compliance_handoff_at=0.5,
    compliance_controller="cartesian_impedance",
    timeout_s=30.0,
    velocity_scaling=0.3,
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Success probes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
get_world_transform(prim_path="/World/Cap")
get_world_transform(prim_path="/World/BottleNeck")
get_contact_report(prim_path="/World/Cap", max_contacts=16)
get_joint_torques(articulation="/World/Franka")
extension_notes: Implements ONET SOC 51-9111 packaging-machine operator persona. Differs from CP-NEW-peg-bushing-impedance by adding a torque-limited rotational seat gesture via follow_trajectory_with_compliance after the impedance-controlled descent. Bottle neck is a static thin Cylinder (radius 0.012 m) on top of a wider Cylinder bottle body; cap is a dynamic wider Cylinder (radius 0.018 m). cuRobo handles transit; impedance + cartesian_impedance compliance handles the last 5 mm + 90° twist. PhysX numerical instability during grip remains a shared risk with all impedance canonicals.
failure_modes: PhysX numerical instability: cap velocity spikes during Franka grip — solver_position_iteration_count=16 + rubber material mitigates; not eliminated.
Cap and bottle neck are both solid Cylinders (no female-thread geometry) — torque-stop is signalled by the FT sensor + follow_trajectory_with_compliance handoff, not by mesh contact.
setup_impedance_controller and set_compliance_params are dry_run=True — no live torque-mode control without a ros2_control bridge; production rollout requires setup_ros2_control_compat first.
follow_trajectory_with_compliance is Phase 63b — trajectory waypoint dicts must contain joint_positions OR pose; pose-only is accepted but cuRobo replan is gated.
drop_target Z=0.945 requires cuRobo IK reachability — verify with solve_ik if planning fails; bottle neck obstacle may force a longer approach.
follow_trajectory_with_compliance compliance_controller='cartesian_impedance' is enum-validated — fallback 'admittance' is acceptable if cartesian_impedance is unavailable in the controller manager.
verified_status: drafted-2026-05-16; form-gate-schema ✓; function-gate ⏳ Kit RPC + ros2_control bridge
code_template:
# ── Scene skeleton ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Robot ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

# ── Bottle + neck ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path={{bottle.path}},
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position={{bottle.position}},
    radius={{bottle.radius}},
    height={{bottle.height}},
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{bottle.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path={{bottle.path}}, attr_name="physics:approximation", value="convexHull")

create_prim(
    prim_path={{bottle_neck.path}},
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position={{bottle_neck.position}},
    radius={{bottle_neck.radius}},
    height={{bottle_neck.height}},
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{bottle_neck.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path={{bottle_neck.path}}, attr_name="physics:approximation", value="convexHull")

# ── Cap ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path={{cap.path}},
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position={{cap.position}},
    radius={{cap.radius}},
    height={{cap.height}},
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{cap.path}}, schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path={{cap.path}}, attr_name="physics:mass", value={{cap.mass_kg}})
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{cap.path}}, material_name="rubber")
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{cap.path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{cap.path}}, {{bottle_neck.path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

# ── FT sensor ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path={{ft_sensor.path}},
    parent_path={{ft_sensor.parent_path}},
    threshold={{ft_sensor.threshold}},
    noise_std=0.05,
)

# ── Impedance controller (softened Z for descent) ────────────────────────────
setup_impedance_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_frame="panda_hand",
    Kx=[300.0, 300.0, 80.0],
    Kr=[30.0, 30.0, 15.0],
    Dx=[30.0, 30.0, 10.0],
    Dr=[3.0, 3.0, 2.0],
    null_space_stiffness=0.5,
    null_space_damping=0.5,
    torque_mode=True,
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Compliance params for the seat-twist gesture ─────────────────────────────
set_compliance_params(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    stiffness_xyz=[300.0, 300.0, 80.0],
    damping_xyz=[30.0, 30.0, 10.0],
    stiffness_rot=[30.0, 30.0, 8.0],
    damping_rot=[3.0, 3.0, 1.5],
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Pick sensor + pick-place transit ─────────────────────────────────────────
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    position={{pick_sensor.position}},
    size={{pick_sensor.size}},
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path=None,
    source_paths=[{{cap.path}}],
    destination_path={{bottle_neck.path}},
    drop_target={{seat_drop_target}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{bottle.path}}, {{bottle_neck.path}}],
    approach_height=0.15,
    lift_height=0.15,
)

# ── Torque-limited rotational seat ───────────────────────────────────────────
follow_trajectory_with_compliance(
    trajectory=[
        {"pose": {"position": {{seat_drop_target}}, "orientation": [1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0]}},
        {"pose": {"position": {{seat_drop_target}}, "orientation": [0.9239, 0.0, 0.0, 0.3827]}},
        {"pose": {"position": {{seat_drop_target}}, "orientation": [0.7071, 0.0, 0.0, 0.7071]}}
    ],
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    compliance_handoff_at=0.5,
    compliance_controller="cartesian_impedance",
    timeout_s=30.0,
    velocity_scaling=0.3,
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Success probes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
get_world_transform(prim_path={{cap.path}})
get_world_transform(prim_path={{bottle_neck.path}})
get_contact_report(prim_path={{cap.path}}, max_contacts=16)
get_joint_torques(articulation={{primary_robot.path}})
